items.title: Apparently I've gone viral in the world of TikTok sports edits for a rant against Egor Demin as a top-10 pick a year ago. Whoops. He looks fantastic in summer league and I've given my mea culpa below:
items.author: Ricky O'Donnell
items.body_excerpt: Apparently I've gone viral in the world of TikTok sports edits for a rant against Egor Demin as a top-10 pick a year ago. Whoops. He looks fantastic in summer league and I've given my mea culpa below:

items.title: Egor Demin: too good for summer league.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt:
Egor Demin: too good for summer league. 

16 pts 3 assists just in the first quarter, Nets lead Kings 38-18 after 1.

items.title: Egor Demin was solid and Nets got a strong first half from 2-way Chaney Johnson.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt:
Egor Demin was solid and Nets got a strong first half from 2-way Chaney Johnson.

OTOH ... Danny Wolf parlayed his ~50 dribbles into zero points and 1 assist, Drake Powell was invisible, Mikel Brown struggled, and Ben Saraf was outplayed by an actual hobbit.
